channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: JD Vance refused five times to acknowledge Donald Trump lost 2020 election in podcast interview
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — JD Vance, Republican vice presidential nominee, again refused to acknowledge that President Joe Biden won the 2020 election over former President Donald Trump, evading the question five times in an interview with The New York Times, the newspaper reported Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US sees a window for a new push to break political deadlock in Lebanon to ease conflict
item.description: Some in Washington and elsewhere believe there may be a window for a new push to break the political deadlock in Lebanon to try to ease escalating war.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump announces 'Operation Aurora' to target illegal immigrant gang members in Colorado
item.description: Former President Trump is expected to announce “Operation Aurora" during his rally in Colorado Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris viewed more positively by Hispanic women than by Hispanic men: AP-NORC poll
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A solid majority of Hispanic women have a positive opinion of Vice President Kamala Harris and a negative view of former President Donald Trump, but Hispanic men are more divided on both candidates, according to a recent poll from The Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA and LINLEY SANDERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia election workers settle defamation lawsuit against conservative website
item.description: Two Georgia election workers have reached a settlement in their defamation lawsuit against a Missouri-based website that falsely accused them of fraud in the 2020 presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Amy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 3 in 5 millennials want full access to abortion: Study
item.description: The largest percentile of individuals who do not want to live in a "fully legal" abortion state is Gen Z at 33%, followed by Gen X and Baby Boomers (30%).
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Kern County District 2 Supervisors debate recap
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- There's a crowded debate stage, a reflection of the packed candidate field, in the race to replace former Supervisor Zack Scrivner in Kern County's 2nd District.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Huh, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Third-party candidate Cornel West loses bid to get on Pennsylvania's presidential ballot
item.description: A federal judge is turning down third-party candidate Cornel West’s request to be put on Pennsylvania’s presidential ballot.
item.dc:creator: Mark Scolforo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Abortion has passed inflation as the top election issue for women under 30, survey finds
item.description: A survey has found that abortion has passed inflation to become the top issue in the presidential election for women younger than 30.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Mulvihill, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: House Democrats bet on small and fun events for minority outreach
item.description: The House Democratic campaign arm is increasingly relying on small, community-centered events for its get-out-the-vote efforts among voters of color, looking to increase interest with nonpolitical hooks.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Harris rips Trump for his criticism of federal storm response and calls for 'dignity'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris and the White House criticized Donald Trump for his attacks on the federal response to Hurricanes Helene and Milton and suggested he was wrongly trying to turn the deadly storms to his political advantage.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA VOLMERT, DARLENE SUPERVILLE and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Maryland Senate debate
item.description: Former Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan (R) and Prince George’s County Executive Angela Alsobrooks (D) sparred in their lone debate this cycle Thursday night as they look to replace retiring Sen. Ben Cardin (D-Md.) next year.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Annette Dawson Owens discusses education, healthcare, and affordable housing
item.description: Annette Dawson Owens, a Republican candidate for Nevada’s Assembly District 29, recently discussed her views on education, healthcare, and affordable housing on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Obama urges Black men to show up for Harris as he campaigns in critical Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Barack Obama has given a blistering critique of his White House successor Donald Trump and urged Black men to show up for Kamala Harris as he campaigned in Pittsburgh at the start of a swing-state tour for the Democratic ticket.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Speculation continues over Cuomo run for NYC mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There has been growing speculation this week that former Gov. Andrew Cuomo is rapidly approaching a decision about whether or not to run for New York City mayor.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Live: Trump visits Aurora after Venezuelan gang claims
item.description: The Trump campaign called Aurora a "war zone" in its rally announcement. The city's Republican mayor disagrees.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon could resign: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Less than a month after the NYPD's interim commissioner was appointed, another major shake-up could be coming. Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to step down, sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Republican and Democratic House Latinos face off in race to increase their numbers
item.description: Latino House Republicans are building out campaign infrastructure to protect their members and grow their numbers, at times directly competing with their Democratic counterparts, who have a huge head start. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Trump in virtual dead heat in major swing states
item.description: Vice President Harris and former President Trump are nearly tied in the major swing states that will play a deciding role in the election, according to polling released Thursday by The Hill and Emerson College Polling.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Pat Ryan 'incredibly frustrated' over lack of FEMA relief in Orange County
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The race for New York’s 18th Congressional District heated up on Wednesday evening as candidates Alison Esposito and Pat Ryan faced off in a live debate on PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, PIX 11

item.title: Emily Stevens discusses accountability, safety, and fiscal responsibility on the Clark County School District Board
item.description: Emily Stevens, candidate for the Clark County School District Board of Trustees, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to discuss why she believes she's the right fit for the open seat in District A.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Human Rights Campaign launching ad blitz for Harris, other Democrats
item.description: Human Rights Campaign (HRC) and its Equality Votes political action committee are launching a multimillion-dollar digital ad blitz aimed at reaching "equality voters" for the Harris-Walz ticket in key battleground states, the group announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: How to watch the NY-18 Debate: Ryan vs. Esposito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Candidates in the race for New York’s 18th Congressional District will face off in a debate Wednesday night. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan will take on Republican challenger Alison Esposito in a 60-minute debate moderated by PIX11’s Henry Rosoff.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: Meet the candidates running for Congress in San Diego County
item.description: As Election Day nears, voters in San Diego County will soon get to choose who will represent San Diego County in the U.S. House of Representatives.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: Harris is pressed for more specifics in a wide-ranging interview with '60 Minutes'
item.description: The interview followed criticism from former President Donald Trump that Kamala Harris has been unwilling to sit for hard interviews. She was pressed on everything from her economic proposals to immigration.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota Republicans seek a reset after two years of DFL trifecta in St. Paul
item.description: All 134 Minnesota House seats are on the ballot this fall, along with one state Senate seat. The results could flip political control of the Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News
